name: spades
description: SPADES Framework v2 — a human-AI operating model for engineering teams. Six-phase loop (Scope, Plan, Approve, Do, Evaluate, Ship) over a Project layer, with pluggable backends (Linear MCP, local filesystem, extensible to Notion/Confluence/other). 20 plugin-namespaced skills, four reviewer-persona subagents, one researcher subagent. Pure Markdown — no bash, no external setup.
